Top Private BTech Colleges in India 2026: Fees, Admissions, Placements, Rankings, Cutoff

sundaragiri.kumar

Content Strategist | Updated on - May 30, 2026

Out of 3509 private BTech colleges in India, BITS Pilani, IIIT Bangalore, BITS South Goa, BITS Hyderabad, and VIT University Vellore are the top private BTech colleges according to the Collegedunia Rankings. As per Collegedunia Overall score, BITS Pilani stood at the top with a CD Overall score of 985 (out of 1000), IIIT Bangalore with a score of 917 (out of 1000), and BITS South Goa with a CD Score of 949 (out of 1000). 

  • The average course fees for the BTech program at private BTech colleges in India range from INR 5.15 Lakh at SSNCE Chennai to INR 77.60 Lakh at RVCE Bangalore.
  • Median package at private BTech colleges in India ranges between INR 6 LPA at VIT University, Vellore, and INR 20 LPA at BITS Pilani.
  • Dhirubhai Ambani University, Gandhinagar, has the best ROI, that is 96.40%, with a median package of INR 15.28 LPA and course fees of INR 15.85 Lakh.
  • Balaji Engineering College is the cheapest private BTech college, offering the course only for INR 28.4 K.
  • JEE Main, GATE, TNEA, MHTCET, etc., are the common entrance exams accepted by private BTech colleges in India.

Top 10 Private BTech Colleges in India 2026

College Name Course fees Median Package Exam Accepted /Cutoff (Gen)

  • Balaji Engineering College, Junagadh - INR 28.4 K
  • FC&RI Thoothukudi - INR 28.9 K
  • VGI Kachch - INR 30 K
  • GIDC Degree Engineering College, Navsari - INR 35 K
  • JIST Jorhat - INR 39 K

Ans. Here is the table of the best private BTech colleges in India, where a student can get admission with a JEE Main rank between 30,000 and 50,000.

Ques. What is the admission procedure for BTech course in private BTech colleges in India?

Ans. The admission process for BTech programs in private BTech colleges in India varies by college and state, but most institutions follow one or more of the following routes.

  • Entrance Exam-based admission
    • Joint Entrance Examinations (JEE Main)
    • State entrance exams such as KCET, MHTCET, TS EAMCET, AP EAMCET, etc
    • University-specific exams such as VITEEE, SRMJEEE, MET, and others.
  • Counselling Process
  • Direct admission/Management Quota
  • Eligibility Criteria
    • Pass Class 12 (or equivalent) with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.
    • Meet the minimum percentage requirement specified by the college or state authority.
    • Fulfill any entrance exam requirements, if applicable.
  • Final Admission Confirmation.

Top-Ranked Private BTech Colleges in India by Various Agencies

Top private BTech colleges in India are ranked by multiple agencies such as Collegedunia, IIRF, and NIRF. Below is the list of BTech colleges in India, along with IIRF, NIRF, and Collegedunia ranks and scores, and NAAC grades.

College Name CD Rank CD Score (Out of 2000) NIRF IIRF NAAC
BITS Pilani 6 985 11 (India) 1 (Rajasthan) 1 (India) - 2024 A++
IIIT Bangalore 36 917 69 (India) 1 (Bangalore) 10 (India) - 2024 A+
BITS South Goa 22 949 - - A++
BITS Hyderabad 20 954 - 46 (India) - 2024 A++
VIT University Vellore 45 897 16 (India) 4 (Tamil Nadu) 5 (India) - 2024 A++
Thapar University Patiala 51 883 29 (India) 1 (Punjab) 2 (India) - 2024 A++
BIT Mesra Ranchi 39 911 51 (India) 2 (Jharkhand) 8 (India) - 2024 A
Dhirubhai Ambani University, Gandhinagar 34 922 201-300 (India) 5 (Gujarat) 4 (India) - 2024 A+
RVCE Bangalore 49 888 101-150 (India) 5 (Bangalore) 7 (India) - 2024 A+
LNMIIT Jaipur 90 909 201-300 (India) 7 (Rajasthan) 89 (India) - 2024 A
BMSCE Bangalore 55 874 151-200 (India) 6 (Bangalore) 9 (India) - 2024 A++

Note: The CD Score Calculated is based on the summation of Academic and Placement scores. The academic scores are calculated based on the State exam Cutoff or All India Entrance exam cutoff, along with Student reviews, NAAC, and Agency rankings, while the placement scores are calculated based on the Average Package or median package for that college.

Top Private BTech Colleges in India: ROI Wise

Dhirubhai Ambani University, Gandhinagar, has the highest ROI of 96.40% with an average/median package of INR 15.28 LPA and a total course fee amounting to INR 15.85 Lakh. Following is the list of the top private BTech colleges along with their ROI.

College Name Course fees Median fees ROI%
Dhirubhai Ambani University, Gandhinagar INR 15.85 Lakh INR 15.28 LPA 96.40%
BITS Pilani INE 25.29 Lakh INR 20 LPA 79.08%
VIT University Vellore INR 7.83 Lakh INR 6 LPA 76.63%
BITS South Goa INR 25.29 Lakh INR 19.05 LPA 75.33%
BITS Hyderabad INR 25.29 Lakh INR 19.05 LPA 75.33%
BIT Mesra Ranchi INR 16.77 Lakh INR 10 LPA 59.63%
LNMIIT Jaipur INR 23.04 Lakh INR 12 LPA 52.08%

RVCE Bangalore INR 77.60 Lakh INR 10.50 LPA 13.53%

Student Perception of the Top Private BTech Colleges in India

The Student perception regarding the top Private BTech Colleges in India is detailed below, along with the overall ratings on a scale of 5, as well as the most loved things, and what areas to improve, summarised from the reviews given by students or alumni of the respective colleges.

College Name Overall Ratings Academics Faculty Most Loved Things Areas of Improvement
BITS Pilani 4.4 (720 Reviews) 4.3 4.1 Placement, Merit Scholarship, and Campus Life Grading system and Water quality issues
IIIT Bangalore 4.2 (51 Reviews) 4.5 4.4 Placements, Qualified faculty, Curriculum. Gender ratio is not good, strict attendance policy.
BITS South Goa 4.3 (130 Reviews) 4.2 4.0 Faculty, Coding Culture, and Campus Grading System, Gender Ratio, and Fee Structure
BITS Hyderabad 4.5 (217 Reviews) 4.3 4.3 Infrastructure, Social Life, and Academic Freedom Hostel Amenities and Alumni Network
VIT University Vellore 4.1 (3642 Reviews) 4.1 4.0 Placement, Course Curriculum, and Campus Life Water TDS and Hostel Amenities
Thapar University Patiala 3.9 (895 Reviews) 3.8 4.0 Scholarship Opportunities, Infrastructure, and Internship Fee Structure and Course Curriculum
BIT Mesra Ranchi 3.7 (1040 Reviews) 4.0 3.9 Placements, best hostels, and internships Mess Quality, no financial assistance
Dhirubhai Ambani University, Gandhinagar 4.3 (96 Reviews) 4.3 4.3 Library, Internships, Scholarships, Campus No attached bathrooms in hostel rooms, tough academics
RVCE Bangalore 3.9 (442 Reviews) 4.1 4.0 Placements, Qualified faculty, college fests, and events Few scholarships, poor internet faciliities
LNMIIT Jaipur 3.9 (414 Reviews) 3.8 3.8 Fests, modern equipment, and technology Grading system, 75% attendance, and infrastructure

Top Private BTech Colleges in India: Admission 2026

Mostly, BTech colleges accept the JEE Main scores, but a few of the colleges even conduct their own exam for selection. The details of the top 10 BTech colleges with Exam Accepted and Cutoffs are mentioned below.

College Name Exam Accepted Cutoff (Gen) 2024
BITS Pilani BITSAT 203 (Environmental & Sustainability Engg) - 304 (Computer Science)

BITS South Goa BITSAT 189 (Environmental & Sustainability Engg) - 274 (Computer Science)
BITS Hyderabad BISAT 181 (Environmental & Sustainability Engg) - 270 (Computer Science)
VIT University Vellore VITEEE 600 (CSE) - 56500 (Civil Engineering)
Thapar University Patiala JEE Main 31743 (CSE) - 487676 (ECE)
BIT Mesra Ranchi JEE Main 18711 (CSE) - 61127 (Food Engineering)
Dhirubhai Ambani University, Gandhinagar JEE Main 80 (Mathematics & Computing) - 290 (VLSI Design)
RVCE Bangalore KCET 499 (CSE) - 15717 (Industrial Engineering & Management)
BMSCE Bangalore KCET 3870 (CSE) - 43431 (Civil Engineering)

Private BTech Colleges in India without Entrance Exam

Many private BTech colleges in India offer BTech admission without JEE Main through management quota, merit-based admission, institute-level seats, or direct admission processes. However, most top private colleges still require basic eligibility, such as passing class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.

College Name Admission Mode Popular Branches
VIT Vellore Management/Institutional Seats CSE, AI, IT, ECE
SRM Institute of Science and Technology Direct Admission & Management Quota CSE, AI, Data Science
Manipal Institute of Technology Institutional Seats CSE, FinTech, AI
Amity University Merit-Based Admission CSE, Cyber Security, AI
PES University Management Quota CSE, AIML, ECE
BMS College of Engineering Management Quota CSE, ISE, ECE
RV College of Engineering Management Quota CSE, AI, ECE
MS Ramaiah Institute of Technology Management Quota CSE, AIML, ECE
Lovely Professional University Direct Admission & LPUNEST CSE, IT, AI
KIIT University Direct Admission & KIITEE Route CSE, IT, ECE
SASTRA University Merit-Based Admission CSE, Mechanical, ECE
